changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes security controls relevant to information protection and PII security. However, the audit logging function needed a naming adjustment to align with the existing pattern for API server configurations. The function names are now consistent, descriptive, and specific.
naming_improvements: Ensure all audit-related functions specify 'apiserver' for clarity and consistency
title: Mission And Business Process Definition - Determine information protection and personally...
step1_reasoning: The control PM-11-b focuses on information protection and personally identifiable information (PII) security, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security domains. Encryption at rest is crucial for protecting sensitive data, which aligns with enabling encryption for Secrets and etcd. Audit logging is essential for tracking access and changes, hence enabling Kubernetes audit logging is relevant. Ensuring secure transport aligns with enabling TLS for ingress traffic.
